llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The repo has Prisma/SQLite wiring, migrations, deterministic db:prepare, an idempotent protected default endpoint seed, repeatability unit coverage, and generated schema docs matching the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase models. The provided deterministic check record shows all required gates passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare prepares SQLite runtime state via Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed defaults.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by a unit test that runs it twice against an isolated SQLite database and asserts singular seed rows.

The schema represents endpoint name/title/description/enabled/protected/delete code/default response/timestamps/basic failure fields, ordered parameters, and response cases with match/response/default/error/delay fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented persistence models and seed assumptions.
Required commands passed in the deterministic check summary: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, npm run verify.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The provided deterministic check record shows all required gates passed.
